description: baseline: govulncheck 0 symbol vulns, 1 package vuln (edwards25519, not called), 1 module vuln (x/image TIFF, not used)
Windows cmd /c start <url> allows shell metacharacter injection (&, |) in URLs constructed from user input
.bt/hooks.yaml commands execute via sh -c without sandboxing - malicious repo clone = arbitrary code execution
No recursion depth limit in BQL parser or executor - deeply nested query causes stack overflow via CLI --bql
dateToSQL interpolates values via fmt.Sprintf without parameterization - LATENT (SQLBuilder not yet used in production)
Git SHA args from bead data not validated as hex - crafted JSONL could inject git arguments starting with --
fieldToColumn returns "i." + field for unknown fields - no self-validation. LATENT (validator provides upstream protection)
Database names interpolated into UNION ALL SQL via backtickQuote. Correct escaping but no regex validation on db names
No limit on IN (...) value count - millions of values cause linear memory exhaustion via CLI --bql
io.Copy from tar to disk without io.LimitReader - decompression bomb possible. Mitigated by expected size check on download
Dolt DSN (root@tcp(127.0.0.1:port)/db) surfaces in user-visible status bar errors via shortError()
Bead IDs passed to git --grep without regex escaping - crafted IDs could manipulate grep pattern matching
Silent error swallowing: ResolveRevision failure uses zero value; Getwd failure leaves empty project dir
Windows lock takeover uses Remove+Rename (not atomic rename) - narrow TOCTOU race could allow two instances
Dolt DSN uses hardcoded root user with no password. Expected for local Dolt but prevents future remote use
GO-2026-4503: MultiScalarMult invalid results. Not exploitable - bt never calls affected function
GO-2026-4815: TIFF decoder OOM. Not exploitable - bt only uses font/basicfont, never TIFF decoder
EDITOR/VISUAL handling uses strict allowlist - blocks terminal editors, shells, interpreters. Well-mitigated
Self-updater uses SHA256 checksum verification. Auth header stripped on non-GitHub redirects. Solid integrity chain
expandEnv resolves ${VAR} in hook env values from combined OS+context env. No injection - variables from trusted YAML
Panics in TUI main thread not recovered - would crash terminal. Standard Bubble Tea behavior
All 10 YAML unmarshal sites use typed structs. yaml.v3 disables anchors for billion-laughs by default. Safe
JSONL reader has 10MB per-line buffer cap via bufio.ReaderSize. Malformed lines skipped. DoS-resistant
FindWorkspaceConfig walks up to root seeking .bt/workspace.yaml. No user-controlled path injection. Safe
GITHUB_TOKEN only sent to GitHub domains. isGitHubHost check + redirect auth stripping prevents token leakage
Background worker uses sync.RWMutex + atomic types. Tea msgs for cross-goroutine comms. No data races found
Clipboard write-only, copies cass search commands. No sensitive data (passwords/tokens) ever written
Files created 0644, dirs 0755, binaries 0755. Appropriate permissions throughout
Auto-reconnect after 3 failures calls EnsureServer. Bounded by poll interval (5s). No amplification
Repo/project names from wizard passed to exec.Command directly (not shell). No injection via exec.Command
Nascent dependency (2 stars, 11 commits). Shells out to external tru binary. Low current risk, worth monitoring
